hooks.command: in=$(cat); fields=$(printf '%s' "$in" | grep -oiE '"(file_path|command|path)"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"([^"\\]|\\.)*"'); if printf '%s' "$fields" | grep -qiP '\.env($|[^A-Za-z0-9_.])|\.env\.(?!(?:example|sample|template)\b)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Reading .env files is blocked by a project policy hook in .claude/settings.json (.env.example/.sample/.template are allowed). Ask the user for the specific value you need."}}'; fi
